audia

  • Installation
    • Requirements
    • Standard install
    • Recommended: pipx
    • Optional extras
    • Install from source
    • Verify

    • 1. Configure
    • 2. Convert a local PDF
    • 3. Search ArXiv and convert
    • 4. Voice input
    • 5. Web UI
    • 6. Show active config

    • LLM provider (required)
      • Option A — OpenAI
      • Option B — Anthropic
      • Shared LLM settings
    • TTS backend
    • STT (voice input)
    • Storage
    • Web server
    • Research
    • Full .env.example

Guides

  • Pipeline
    • Entry points
    • Step 1 — PDF extraction (pdf_processor.py)
    • Step 2 — Heuristic pre-pass (text_cleaner.py)
    • Step 3 — LLM curation (text_cleaner.py — llm_curate)
    • Step 4 — TTS synthesis (tts.py)
    • State (state.py)
    • Debug output
  • CLI Reference
    • audia convert
    • audia research
    • audia listen
    • audia serve
    • audia info
    • audia --version
  • Web UI
    • Starting the server
    • Tabs
      • Convert
      • Research
      • Configuration
      • Library (Database)
    • API endpoints (summary)
  • TTS Backends
    • edge-tts (default)
    • Kokoro (local)
    • OpenAI TTS
    • Chunk size tuning
  • LLM Backends
    • OpenAI
      • Custom endpoint
    • Anthropic
      • Custom endpoint
    • Shared settings
    • How the LLM is used
  • Storage
    • Location
    • Schema
      • papers
      • audio_files
      • research_sessions
      • user_settings
    • Exploring the database

  • audia.agents — Pipeline agents
    • audia.agents.graph — LangGraph pipeline
      • node_extract_text()
      • node_preprocess()
      • node_curate()
      • node_synthesize_audio()

      • run_pipeline()

        • PipelineState.cleaned_text

        • PipelineState.audio_filename
        • PipelineState.title
        • PipelineState.num_pages
        • PipelineState.tts_backend
        • PipelineState.tts_voice

        • ExtractionResult.num_pages
        • ExtractionResult.title
      • extract_text()

      • heuristic_clean()
      • llm_curate()
      • llm_clean()
      • curate_text()
      • clean_text()

      • synthesize()
    • audia.agents.stt — Speech-to-text + query distillation
      • record_and_transcribe()
      • transcribe_file()
      • distill_search_query()

Project

  • Changelog
  • CHANGELOG
    • Version 0.3.5 (2026-03-31)
      • Rebuild frontend
    • Version 0.3.4 (2026-03-31)
      • Custom API base URLs for OpenAI and Anthropic
    • Version 0.3.3 (2026-03-31)
      • Icon system, TTS voice selector & database editor
        • Icon system (constants/index.ts)
        • TTS voice selector (Configuration tab)
        • Database explorer — editable cells
        • Database explorer — table UX
    • Version 0.3.2 (2026-03-30)
      • Convert tab improvements
        • Instant PDF preview on upload
        • Collapsible full-progress log
    • Version 0.3.1 (2026-03-30)
      • Frontend refactor & database explorer
        • Main.tsx split into tab components
        • Database tab (MainDatabase.tsx)
        • API additions (library router)
        • scripts/explore_db.py
    • Version 0.3.0 (2026-03-29)
      • Configuration, voice search & LLM query normalisation
        • Configuration tab
        • Voice search (Research tab)
        • LLM query normalisation (Research tab)
        • API additions
        • Code hygiene
    • Version 0.2.0 (2026-03-29)
      • Web UI overhaul
    • Version 0.1.2 (2026-03-29)
      • ArXiv search robustness & CLI improvements
        • ArXiv search
        • PDF download
        • CLI output
    • Version 0.1.1 (2026-03-29)
      • listen command pipeline overhaul
    • Version 0.1.0 (2026-03-29)
      • First fully working release: PDF to audio via mandatory LLM curation and edge-tts synthesis.
    • Version 0.0.1 (2026-03-28)
audia
  • audia.ui — Web UI (FastAPI)

audia.ui — Web UI (FastAPI)

audia.ui.app — FastAPI application

FastAPI application factory for the audia web UI.

audia.ui.app.create_app()[source]
Return type:

fastapi.FastAPI

audia.ui.jobs — Background job store

Shared in-memory job store for background conversion tasks.

Both /api/convert/enqueue and /api/research/enqueue write here. The status endpoint and the cancel endpoint read/write here.

Routes

audia.ui.routes.convert

/api/convert – Upload PDF → run pipeline → return audio file path. Includes background-job endpoints for granular progress tracking.

async audia.ui.routes.convert.upload_and_convert(file=fastapi.File, voice=fastapi.Form, llm_provider=fastapi.Form, llm_model=fastapi.Form, tts_backend=fastapi.Form)

Synchronous upload + convert. Returns the download URL when done.

Parameters:

  • file (fastapi.UploadFile)

  • voice (str | None)

  • llm_provider (str | None)

  • llm_model (str | None)

  • tts_backend (str | None)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.convert.enqueue_conversion(file=fastapi.File, voice=fastapi.Form, llm_provider=fastapi.Form, llm_model=fastapi.Form, tts_backend=fastapi.Form)

Upload a PDF and return a job_id immediately; poll /status/{job_id} for progress.

Parameters:

  • file (fastapi.UploadFile)

  • voice (str | None)

  • llm_provider (str | None)

  • llm_model (str | None)

  • tts_backend (str | None)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.convert.get_job_status(job_id)

Return current status, stage, progress, log, result when done.

Parameters:

job_id (str)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.convert.cancel_job(job_id)

Signal the job runner to stop after the current stage.

Parameters:

job_id (str)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.convert.serve_job_pdf(job_id)

Stream the PDF associated with a conversion job (available as soon as uploaded/downloaded).

Parameters:

job_id (str)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.FileResponse

async audia.ui.routes.convert.download_audio(audio_id)

Stream the generated audio file.

Parameters:

audio_id (int)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.FileResponse

audia.ui.routes.research

/api/research – Search ArXiv and convert selected papers to audio.

class audia.ui.routes.research.SearchRequest(*, query, max_results=10)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

  • query (str)

  • max_results (int)

query: str
max_results: int
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class audia.ui.routes.research.NormalizeRequest(*, query)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

query (str)

query: str
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class audia.ui.routes.research.ConvertResearchRequest(*, arxiv_ids)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

arxiv_ids (list[str])

arxiv_ids: list[str]
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class audia.ui.routes.research.EnqueueRequest(*, arxiv_ids, llm_provider=None, llm_model=None, tts_backend=None)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

  • arxiv_ids (list[str])

  • llm_provider (str | None)

  • llm_model (str | None)

  • tts_backend (str | None)

arxiv_ids: list[str]
llm_provider: str | None
llm_model: str | None
tts_backend: str | None
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

async audia.ui.routes.research.normalize(body)

Uses the same distill_search_query function as the CLI speech pipeline.

Parameters:

body (NormalizeRequest)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.research.search(body)

Search ArXiv and return paper metadata.

Parameters:

body (SearchRequest)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.research.convert_papers(body)

Search, download, run pipeline, and save for each arxiv_id. Returns results synchronously.

Parameters:

body (ConvertResearchRequest)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.research.enqueue_research(body)

For each arxiv_id, create an async job that downloads, processes, and saves to the library. Returns job_ids immediately; poll /api/research/status/{job_id} for progress.

Parameters:

body (EnqueueRequest)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.research.transcribe_audio(file=fastapi.File)

Accept a browser audio recording and return the Whisper transcription.

Parameters:

file (fastapi.UploadFile)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.research.get_job_status(job_id)

Return current status, stage, progress, log, result when done.

Parameters:

job_id (str)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.research.cancel_job(job_id)
Parameters:

job_id (str)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.research.serve_job_pdf(job_id)

Stream the PDF associated with a research job (once downloaded).

Parameters:

job_id (str)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.FileResponse

audia.ui.routes.library

/api/library – Query the local SQLite library of papers and audio files.

async audia.ui.routes.library.list_papers()

Return all papers stored in the local database.

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.library.list_audio()

Return all audio files stored in the local database.

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.library.list_research_sessions()

Return all research sessions stored in the local database.

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.library.list_user_settings()

Return all user settings stored in the local database.

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

class audia.ui.routes.library.PaperPatch(*, title=None, authors=None, abstract=None, arxiv_id=None, pdf_url=None)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

  • title (str | None)

  • authors (list[str] | None)

  • abstract (str | None)

  • arxiv_id (str | None)

  • pdf_url (str | None)

title: str | None
authors: list[str] | None
abstract: str | None
arxiv_id: str | None
pdf_url: str | None
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class audia.ui.routes.library.AudioPatch(*, filename=None, file_path=None, duration_seconds=None, tts_backend=None, tts_voice=None, paper_id=None)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

  • filename (str | None)

  • file_path (str | None)

  • duration_seconds (float | None)

  • tts_backend (str | None)

  • tts_voice (str | None)

  • paper_id (int | None)

filename: str | None
file_path: str | None
duration_seconds: float | None
tts_backend: str | None
tts_voice: str | None
paper_id: int | None
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class audia.ui.routes.library.ResearchSessionPatch(*, query=None)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

query (str | None)

query: str | None
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class audia.ui.routes.library.UserSettingPatch(*, value)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

value (str)

value: str
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

async audia.ui.routes.library.patch_paper(paper_id, body)

Partially update a paper’s editable fields.

Parameters:

  • paper_id (int)

  • body (PaperPatch)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.library.patch_audio(audio_id, body)

Partially update an audio file’s editable fields.

Parameters:

  • audio_id (int)

  • body (AudioPatch)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.library.patch_research_session(session_id, body)

Partially update a research session’s editable fields.

Parameters:

  • session_id (int)

  • body (ResearchSessionPatch)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.library.patch_user_setting(key, body)

Update the value for an existing user setting key.

Parameters:

  • key (str)

  • body (UserSettingPatch)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.library.delete_audio(audio_id)

Remove an audio file record (and optionally the file on disk).

Parameters:

audio_id (int)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.library.get_paper(paper_id)

Return a single paper record including linked audio files.

Parameters:

paper_id (int)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.library.delete_paper(paper_id)

Remove a paper record, its audio file records, and the files from disk.

Parameters:

paper_id (int)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.library.serve_pdf(paper_id)

Stream the original PDF file for in-browser preview.

Parameters:

paper_id (int)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.FileResponse

audia.ui.routes.settings

/api/settings – Persist and retrieve user-configured pipeline settings. Settings are stored in the SQLite DB as key-value pairs so they survive server restarts and are pre-loaded by the frontend on every page open.

class audia.ui.routes.settings.SettingsBody(*, stt_model=None, llm1_provider=None, llm1_model=None, llm2_provider=None, llm2_model=None, tts_backend=None)[source]

Bases: BaseModel

Parameters:

  • stt_model (str | None)

  • llm1_provider (str | None)

  • llm1_model (str | None)

  • llm2_provider (str | None)

  • llm2_model (str | None)

  • tts_backend (str | None)

stt_model: str | None
llm1_provider: str | None
llm1_model: str | None
llm2_provider: str | None
llm2_model: str | None
tts_backend: str | None
model_config = {}

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

async audia.ui.routes.settings.get_ui_settings()

Return the user-saved pipeline settings merged with defaults.

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse

async audia.ui.routes.settings.save_ui_settings(body)

Persist the provided settings; omitted fields are left unchanged.

Parameters:

body (SettingsBody)

Return type:

fastapi.responses.JSONResponse
